name: Helios
description: Helios — OpenTelemetry-based tracing and API testing platform for understanding and validating microservice call flows.

seo.title: Helios — Performance Monitoring / APM
seo.meta_description: Helios: Helios — OpenTelemetry-based tracing and API testing platform for understanding and validating microservice call flows.

when_to_use: Validate microservice call flows in integration tests
API test generation from observed trace data
Debug inter-service latency with flow-level context

pros: Great for debugging microservice call flows
API testing generated from real traces
cons: Narrower scope than full APM suites
Product direction has shifted over time
Pricing oriented to dev and QA use, not prod SRE
review.verdict: Sharp tool for developer-time distributed tracing; not a full replacement for a production APM platform.
review.best_for: Dev teams debugging complex microservice interactions
review.not_for: SRE teams needing full production APM, logs, and alerting
